## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who hits this problem and how often? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like Prophet to do? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Other approaches, workarounds, or related tools you looked at -->

## Use case / context

<!-- A real example helps a lot — what would you build with this? -->

## Are you willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this myself
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing or feedback
- [ ] No, just suggesting — feel free to take it

## Anything else?

<!-- Mockups, links, related discussions, prior art -->
